sequence.description: The ordered list of follow-up touches (not including Touch 1 / the initial email).

touch_number.description: Sequential touch number. Touch 1 is the initial email (not in this list). This sequence starts at Touch 2.

day.description: Day number relative to Touch 1 send date on which this touch should be sent (e.g. 3 = send 3 days after Touch 1).

angle.description: The strategic angle this touch uses.

body.description: Full email body for this touch.

word_count.description: Exact word count of this touch's body.

angle_rationale.description: One sentence explaining why this angle was chosen for this position in the sequence.

conditional_logic.description: Behavior rules for the sequence based on prospect response signals.

on_reply.description: Action to take if the prospect replies to any touch in the sequence.

on_ooo.description: Action to take if an out-of-office auto-reply is detected.

on_bounce.description: Action to take if an email bounces (hard or soft).

total_touches.description: Total number of touches in the full sequence including Touch 1 (the initial email).
